headerDisplay: Homebridge plugin that uses Sense Solar monitoring to optimize Tesla EV charging based on solar production.
footerDisplay: For help and documentation, please visit the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/irajczi/homebridge-sense-tesla-ev-optimization).

senseEmail.title: Sense Account Email
senseEmail.description: The email address associated with your Sense Energy Monitor account.

sensePassword.title: Sense Account Password
sensePassword.description: The password for your Sense Energy Monitor account.

teslaEmail.title: Tesla Account Email
teslaEmail.description: The email address associated with your Tesla account.

teslaRefreshToken.title: Tesla Refresh Token
teslaRefreshToken.description: Your Tesla API refresh token. Obtain this via the Tesla Auth app or similar tool.

vehicleVIN.title: Vehicle VIN
vehicleVIN.description: The VIN of the Tesla vehicle to control. If omitted, the first vehicle on the account will be used.

minimumChargeAmps.title: Minimum Charge Amps
minimumChargeAmps.description: The minimum charging current (in amps) to allow when solar production is low.

maximumChargeAmps.title: Maximum Charge Amps
maximumChargeAmps.description: The maximum charging current (in amps) to allow.

targetSoC.title: Target State of Charge (%)
targetSoC.description: The target battery state of charge percentage.

pollingIntervalSeconds.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingIntervalSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to poll Sense for solar data and adjust charging.
